_notes: Source: AU Core MedicationRequest (Australian realm). Target: US Core MedicationRequest (US realm). Both mark status, intent, medication[x], subject, encounter, authoredOn, requester, reasonCode, reasonReference, dosageInstruction as MS. Key differences: US Core adds root error constraint us-core-21; US Core explicitly declares required bindings on status/intent; US Core adds category slicing (required medicationrequest-category) and reported[x] MS; AU Core has AU-specific medication coding slices (PBS/AMT) while US Core uses a single extensible US NLM binding; AU Core makes authoredOn/requester mandatory (min=1) with AU error constraint while US Core leaves them optional; requester reference targets differ; reasonCode/reasonReference handling differs; US Core adds detailed dosageInstruction sub-elements and dispenseRequest constraints absent in AU Core.

drifts.description: identifier type profile changed: source AU Core allows AU-specific identifier profiles (au-etpprescriptionidentifier, au-localprescriptionidentifier) in addition to base Identifier; target US Core uses base Identifier only.

New error constraint us-core-21(error) added in target: US Core adds a root-level error constraint on MedicationRequest requiring requester when intent is order; source AU Core has no root-level constraint.

status binding explicitly added in target: US Core adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medicationrequest-status); source AU Core does not declare a binding on status in its differential (inherits R4 required binding). Binding explicitly re-declared/tightened in target.

intent binding explicitly added in target: US Core adds required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medicationrequest-intent); source AU Core does not declare a binding on intent in its differential (inherits R4 required binding). Binding explicitly re-declared/tightened in target.
category slicing added in target: US Core adds pattern-type discriminator slicing on category; source AU Core does not constrain category. Slicing added on optional element.

New MustSupport slice category:us-core added in target: US Core adds category:us-core[mustSupport=true, required(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/medicationrequest-category)]; source has no category slicing. New MS=true slice with required binding added.

reported[x] MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds reported[x][mustSupport=true, types=boolean|Reference(us-core-practitioner|organization|patient|practitionerrole|relatedperson)]; source AU Core does not constrain reported[x]. MS added on optional element.

medication[x] slicing removed in target: source AU Core defines type-discriminator slicing on medication[x] with medicationCodeableConcept and medicationReference slices; target US Core has no slicing on medication[x] (replaces with a unified extensible binding).

medication[x]:medicationCodeableConcept AU-specific coding slicing removed in target: source has pattern-type slicing on medicationCodeableConcept.coding with pbs[MS, required:AU PBS VS] and amt[MS, required:AU AMT VS] slices; target has no medication coding sub-slices.

medication[x] overall binding added in target: US Core adds extensible(http://cts.nlm.nih.gov/fhir/ValueSet/2.16.840.1.113762.1.4.1010.4) [US NLM medication codes] on medication[x]; source AU Core has no overall binding on medication[x] (only AU-specific required bindings on coding sub-slices). New US realm binding replaces AU sub-slice bindings.

medication[x]:medicationReference reference target changed: source constrains medicationReference to au-core-medication (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-medication) → target US Core constrains medication[x] Reference to us-core-medication (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-medication). Different realm-specific profiles.

subject reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-patient (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-patient) → target constrains to us-core-patient (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-patient). Different realm-specific patient profiles.

supportingInformation:bodyHeight AU slice removed in target: AU Core defines supportingInformation:bodyHeight (Reference bodyheight observation, optional, mustSupport=true); US Core MedicationRequest has no supportingInformation slicing.

supportingInformation:bodyWeight AU slice removed in target: AU Core defines supportingInformation:bodyWeight (Reference bodyweight observation, optional, mustSupport=true); US Core MedicationRequest has no supportingInformation slicing.

encounter reference target changed: source constrains to au-core-encounter (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/core/StructureDefinition/au-core-encounter) → target constrains to us-core-encounter (http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/StructureDefinition/us-core-encounter). Different realm-specific encounter profiles.

Source constraint au-core-medreq-01(error) on authoredOn removed in target: AU Core defines an error constraint requiring authoredOn to be present when a value is provided; US Core has no equivalent constraint on authoredOn.
authoredOn cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [mustSupport=true, no min constraint (inherits R4 base min=0)]. Min decreased from 1 to 0. MustSupport preserved in both.
requester cardinality relaxed: source [min=1, mustSupport=true] → target [mustSupport=true, no min constraint (inherits R4 base min=0)]. Min decreased from 1 to 0. MustSupport preserved in both.

requester reference targets changed: source [au-core-practitioner, au-core-practitionerrole, au-core-organization, au-core-patient, au-relatedperson] → target [us-core-practitioner, us-core-patient, us-core-organization, us-core-practitionerrole, us-core-relatedperson, Device]. AU profiles replaced by US profiles; Device added as new target in US Core.
reasonCode MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true (no binding in differential); target has no MS on reasonCode in its differential. MS removed on optional element.

reasonCode binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/reason-for-request-1) [AU reason for request VS] → target extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-condition-code) [US Core condition code VS]. Binding strength changed from preferred to extensible, AU-specific VS replaced by US Core VS.

reasonReference MustSupport removed on optional element: source mustSupport=true, ref→[au-core-condition, Observation]; target does not mark reasonReference as mustSupport in its differential. MS removed on optional element.

reasonReference reference targets removed in target: source constrains to [au-core-condition, Observation]; target does not constrain reasonReference at all (no profile targets in target differential). AU-specific profile references removed.
dosageInstruction type profile changed: source AU Core uses au-dosage profile (http://hl7.org.au/fhir/StructureDefinition/au-dosage) on dosageInstruction; target US Core uses base Dosage type only.

dosageInstruction.text MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds dosageInstruction.text[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core marks dosageInstruction as MS but does not constrain sub-elements. MS added on optional element.

dosageInstruction.timing MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds dosageInstruction.timing[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain this sub-element. MS added on optional element.

dosageInstruction.doseAndRate MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds doseAndRate[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain this sub-element. MS added on optional element.

dosageInstruction.doseAndRate.dose[x] MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds dose[x][mustSupport=true, preferred:ucum-common, types=Quantity|Range]; source AU Core does not constrain this element. MS added on optional element.

dosageInstruction.doseAndRate.dose[x] binding added in target: US Core adds preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/ucum-common) [UCUM units of measure]; source AU Core has no binding on this element. New preferred binding added.
dispenseRequest MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds dispenseRequest[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain dispenseRequest. MS added on optional element.

dispenseRequest.numberOfRepeatsAllowed MustSupport added on optional element in target: US Core adds numberOfRepeatsAllowed[mustSupport=true]; source AU Core does not constrain this element. MS added on optional element.

substitution.reason binding changed: source preferred(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/medicine-substitution-reason-1) [AU medicine substitution reason VS] → target example(http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v3-SubstanceAdminSubstitutionReason) [HL7 SubstanceAdminSubstitutionReason VS]. Binding strength weakened from preferred to example and AU-specific VS replaced.

Extension subsidisedConcurrentSupply removed in target: AU Core defines MedicationRequest.extension:subsidisedConcurrentSupply (optional, non-MS); US Core MedicationRequest has no such extension slice.
